headline: BMO Capital, Needham Cut CoStar Group (CSGP) Price Target
summary: CoStar Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) is among the 12 best stocks to buy and hold for the next 2 years. On February 26, BMO Capital analyst Jeffrey Silber cut the price target on CoStar Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) to $53 from $72 while keeping a Market Perform rating on the shares. According to the analyst, the company’s net […]

headline: Is It Time To Reassess CoStar Group (CSGP) After A Sharp Share Price Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether CoStar Group's current share price reflects its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is set up to help you size up what you might actually be paying for. The stock recently closed at US$44.63, with returns of a 10.5% decline over 7 days, 27.4% decline over 30 days, 32.1% decline year to date, 41.5% decline over 1 year, 38.4% decline over 3 years, and 44.1% decline over 5 years, which may change how investors think about its growth potential and...
